Early Stage Startup Program

# Startups get 1 year of Fin free + 93% off Intercom

Fin AI Agent delivers seamless and personal experiences across the entire customer journey from sales to support. The early stage includes 300 free Fin outcomes, 15 free sales qualifications per month and the Intercom Helpdesk from $65 per month.

Apply now

Fin AI Agent for startupsEarly Stage Program

Join 10,000+ fast-growing startups using Fin + Intercom

## Save year on year.

Year 1

93% off

300 free Fin outcomes and 15 free Fin qualifications monthly. Phone, SMS, and WhatsApp charged at list price.

View pricing →

Year 2

50% off

150 free Fin outcomes and 15 free Fin qualifications monthly. Phone, SMS, and WhatsApp charged at list price. [...] ## FAQs

The Early Stage Program gives you access to the Intercom AI-first helpdesk from $65/month with tiered discounts over 3 years: 93% off in Year 1, 50% off in Year 2, and 25% off in Year 3. Year 1 includes 6 Advanced Seats, 6 Copilot Seats, 20 Lite Seats, Proactive Support Plus (500 messages/month), 300 Fin outcomes/month, 15 Fin qualifications/month, and Pro tier access. The 93% discount also applies to usage-based email, messages over 500/month, and additional seats beyond the included 6. Phone, SMS, and WhatsApp are charged at list price. [...] Year 1 includes 300 Fin outcomes/month & 15 Fin qualifications/month. Beyond these inclusions outcomes cost $0.99 each (including resolutions, procedure handoffs, and disqualifications) and qualifications cost $9.99 each (for lead qualification and routing).

Your discount steps down over time: 93% off in Year 1, 50% off in Year 2, and 25% off in Year 3. Free Fin usage also reduces over time. If the costs become too high after your first year, you can move onto our Essential plan starting at $39 per seat per month.

If your company has more than 15 employees, you’re not eligible for the Early Stage Program. However, you can start a free trial of any of our regular plans on the pricing page, or reach out through Messenger to speak with the sales team about other options.

results.title: Fin and Intercom plans explained | Intercom Help
results.content:
Note:

 The pricing above applies to using Fin over chat and email with your current helpdesk. To use Fin over phone (Fin Voice) and for pricing details, please contact Sales.
 Fin for your existing helpdesk is not available via self-serve sign-up. If you're interested in using Fin with your current helpdesk, please contact our Sales team to get access.
 Fin for Sales and Fin for Ecommerce aren't currently available with Fin for other platforms, so you'll need to be on an Intercom plan (Essential, Advanced, or Expert) to access it.

# Discounts

Startups get 90% off Intercom + 1 year of Fin free on Intercom's Early Stage program. Find out what’s included and whether you’re eligible to apply here.

# Getting started [...] Premier Onboarding - Gives access to an onboarding specialist to provide custom onboarding help for a one-time fee.
 Premier Support - With Premier Support, you’ll get faster response times and access to our Premier Support team, 24/7.
 Premier Support Rapid Response - With Premier Support Rapid Response, you’ll get the fastest response times our team has to offer, convenient escalation paths for your most critical questions and access to our Premier Support team, 24/7.

Contact Sales if you’re interested in one of these services.

# Fin AI Agent for your existing helpdesk

If you use HubSpot, Freshdesk, Salesforce, or another external helpdesk, you can purchase Fin AI Agent without an Intercom plan.

Pricing: [...] # Getting started

Start a free trial - no credit card required. During the 14-day trial, you’ll have access to your chosen plan and Fin AI Agent, along with the Pro, Proactive Support Plus and Copilot add-ons.

After the free trial period, simply confirm the plan you want, and add your payment details to continue using Intercom.

Visit our pricing FAQs for more answers and details about pricing, plans and joining Intercom.

💡Tip

Need more help? Get support from our Community Forum  
Find answers and get help from Intercom Support and Community Experts
